# Title
<!-- short descriptive title -->

## Bug
<!-- One sentence: what's broken? -->

## Impact
<!-- Who/what is affected? How badly? Is there a workaround? -->

## Expected Behavior
<!-- One sentence: what should happen instead? -->

## Steps to Reproduce
<!-- Shortest path to trigger the bug. -->

## Logs / Errors
<!-- Optional: paste relevant output. -->

## Environment
<!-- Optional: OS, version, relevant config. -->

## References
<!-- Optional: related issues, docs, links. -->
